text: Dadi ke guzarne ke baad property ko lekar bade bhai se rishta toot gaya hai, aur ab Mummy ne announce kiya ki Mausa-Mausi permanently hamare sath rahenge. Divorcee hone ki wajah se pehle hi 'log kya kahenge' ka darr hai, isliye main unhe mana nahi kar sakti kyunki parivaar ki 'izzat' bachane ke liye bade-buzurgo ke faisle par sawal uthana bad-tameezi mani jati hai. Main bas mann maar kar unki seva mein lag gayi hoon taaki darar aur na badhe.

Inheritance dispute ki wajah se pehle hi ghar mitti mein mil gaya hai aur ab Mummy keh rahi hain ki in-laws ke aane se hi hamara paksh mazboot hoga. Main bacchon ke future aur economic precarity ko lekar pareshan hoon, par Papa ke samman ke liye main unhe jane ko nahi bol sakti kyunki unhone mere liye bahut kurbani di hain. Main bas sabki khatir-daari mein pis rahi hoon taaki rishtedar ye na kahein ki divorce ke baad main sanskar bhool gayi hoon.

Ghar mein jaydad ko lekar sibling estrangement itni badh gayi hai ki mahool hamesha bhari rehta hai, aur ab in-laws ke aane se meri aur bacchon ki privacy bilkul khatam ho gayi. Mera dimaag fat raha hai par parivaar ki shanti ke liye main chup-chap Mummy ki har kadwi baat sunti hoon kyunki hamare yahan bado ke aage bolna maryada ke khilaf hai. Main apni takleef kisi ko nahi bata rahi taaki ghar ki 'izzat' bazaar mein na uchle.

Dadi ke marne ke baad property ka jhagda itna badha ki ab Mummy ne sulah ke liye apne bhai ko permanently hamare sath bhej diya hai. Divorce ka stigma pehle hi bojh hai par main unhe jaane ko nahi bol sakti kyunki rishto ka lihaz rakhna meri primary duty hai. Main bas mann hi mann ghut rahi hoon par bahar se sabki seva kar rahi hoon taaki parivaar ki unity aur Papa ka naam bana rahe.

Joint family mein property dispute ke beech in-laws ka permanent aana mere bacchon ke liye ek naya stress hai, par Papa ki khushi ke liye main chup hoon. Community exclusion ke darr se main unki har baat maan rahi hoon kyunki main parivaar mein aur fracture nahi chahti. Main unke samman mein apni har khwahish kurban kar rahi hoon taaki rishtey bache rahein aur ghar ki 'izzat' par baat na aaye.
